---
name: Corpus suggestion
about: Suggest a new concept note, an addition to an existing note, or a category that should be tracked in the index.
title: "[suggestion] "
labels: ["corpus-suggestion"]
---

> Praxikon is in an early-stage iteration; PRs are paused while the structure matures, but **suggestions as issues are welcome and read**. Please file ideas, corrections, missing canonical names, or "this pattern shows up everywhere and isn't in the corpus yet" notes here.

## The pattern / concept

What is the pattern? Name it in canonical / institutional terms (what would an interviewer call it?). One or two sentences.

## Why it's canon-worthy

What makes this worth a canon entry vs. a personal blog post or a project-internal doc? Is the pattern stack-agnostic? Does it recur across many production codebases? Is there a clean LeetCode or systems-design adjacency?

## An illustrative example (anonymized)

A code snippet, a short description, or a link to a public example. **Please anonymize:** no client names, no PII, no internal URLs, no real customer data. If your only example is private, describe the *shape* of the example without naming the source.

## Adjacencies you can think of

What other concepts in [the index](../indexes/concept-categories.md) does this relate to? What LeetCode problem family is it closest to? What's the canonical academic / industry term?

## Self-check questions you'd put on the note

Two or three interview-style questions that test whether a reader has internalized the concept. (Optional — the maintainer will write these if you don't.)
